recap: Spain's unbeaten streak remained intact as Mikel Merino sealed a 2-1 quarterfinal victory over Belgium with a rebound finish in the 88th minute, just two minutes after entering the pitch. Fabián Ruiz had given Spain the lead in the 30th minute, but Charles De Ketelaere equalized in the 41st to hand Spain their first goal conceded of the tournament, setting up a tense finale that saw backup goalkeeper Senne Lammens gifted the decisive moment when he spilled Pau Cubarsí's long shot. The result sends Spain to face France in the semifinals, extending their 37-match unbeaten run since March 2023.
